name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-dasb

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-dasb
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Dasb SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Dasb SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-dasb
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common dasb
```

> ```

>
> type UserName
>
> str
>
> param _RealName
>

>
> type RealName
>
> str
>
> param _Phone
>
> 按照"国家地区代码|手机号"的格式输入。如: "+86|xxxxxxxx"
>
> type Phone
>
> str
>
> param _Email
>
> 电子邮件
>
> type Email
>
> str
>
> param _ValidateFrom
>
> 用户生效时间，如:"2021-09-22T00:00:00+00:00"
> ```

生效、失效时间不填则用户长期有效
: ```
  type ValidateFrom

  str

  param _ValidateTo

  用户失效时间，如:"2021-09-23T00:00:00+00:00"
  ```

生效、失效时间不填则用户长期有效
: ```
  type ValidateTo

  str

  param _GroupIdSet

  所属用户组ID集合

  type GroupIdSet

  list of int non-negative

  param _AuthType

  认证方式，0 - 本地， 1 - LDAP， 2 - OAuth 不传则默认为0

  type AuthType

  int

  param _ValidateTime

  访问时间段限制， 由0、1组成的字符串，长度168(7 × 24)，代表该用户在一周中允许访问的时间段。字符串中第N个字符代表在一周中的第N个小时， 0 - 代表不允许访问，1 - 代表允许访问

  type ValidateTime

  str

  param _DepartmentId

  所属部门ID，如：“1.2.3”

  type DepartmentId

  str
  ```
